jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CDAC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
